schema.aiMaturity: string — one of: Exploring, Piloting, Scaling, Mature, Unknown
schema.regulations: array of strings — regulatory regimes that apply to this company, e.g. ['EU AI Act', 'DORA', 'GDPR']
schema.existingRelationship: string — none, warm referral, prior conversation, prior client, active client
schema.recruiter: string or null — recruiter/agency name if this company was reached via one

previousApplications.outcome: string — applied, interview, rejected, withdrawn, offer, hired

schema.tailoredPositioning: string — the angle that fits this company specifically, so it doesn't need to be reasoned out again next time
